message:
fix: repair strip_markup and compaction cut-point tests broken by concurrent changes

- strip_markup: add `:`, `-`, `_` to tag heuristic char set so
  `[link=https://...]` tags are stripped; add pure-digit guard so
  `array[0]` is preserved
- compaction: fix find_cut_point_includes_tool_result_when_needed test
  to expect split-turn behavior (User in turn_prefix, not summarize);
  remove shadowed dead code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
